items.name: IntentKV
items.tech: 基于SGLang/vLLM，跨轮次意图感知KV缓存裁剪系统：维护QueryMemory追踪会话意图，结合memory-attention规则和残差cross-attention动态裁剪，slot-map重定向兼容prefix cache。
items.business: 面向LLM推理服务商提供KV优化插件/授权，按GPU成本分成；或自建Agent推理托管。赛道获资本认可（Tensormesh $24.5M，Inferact $150M）。
items.team: Junjie Li、Jiong Lou(通信作者，上海交大助理教授)、Jie Li — 全员上海交大，Jiong Lou研究方向边缘计算/LLM推理系统。
items.operations: arXiv cs.LG cs.AI，基于SGLang/vLLM完整系统实现，代码即将开源(MIT)。
items.tech_en: Cross-turn intent-aware KV cache pruning system based on SGLang/vLLM: maintains QueryMemory to track session intent, applies memory-attention rules and residual cross-attention for dynamic pruning, and uses slot-map redirection for prefix cache compatibility.
items.business_en: Provides KV optimization plugins/licenses to LLM inference service providers, monetized via GPU cost sharing; or self-built Agent inference hosting. The sector has gained capital recognition (Tensormesh $24.5M, Inferact $150M).
items.team_en: Junjie Li, Jiong Lou (corresponding author, Assistant Professor at Shanghai Jiao Tong University), and Jie Li — all from Shanghai Jiao Tong University. Jiong Lou's research focuses on edge computing and LLM inference systems.
items.operations_en: arXiv cs.LG cs.AI, full system implementation based on SGLang/vLLM, code to be open-sourced soon (MIT)

items.name: Agent READMEs: An Empirical Study of Context Files for Agentic Coding
items.tech: Agentic coding tools receive goals written in natural language as input, break them down into specific tasks, and write or execute the actual code with minimal human intervention. Central to this process are agent context files ("READMEs for agents") that provide persistent, project-level instructions.
